steps.title: Use the middle of the list
steps.content: For $11$ consecutive integers, the median is the middle, or sixth, integer. The mean of an evenly spaced list is also the middle value.

steps.title: Compare the mean and median
steps.content: Since $a$ and $b$ are both the middle value, $$a=b$$ Therefore $$|a-b|=0$$ The answer is 0.
